articles.title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding

This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. articles.summary: 针对视频推理模型的“盲目信任”问题，提出置信度感知的工具编排方法，在运动模糊、眩光等扰动下使模型感知退化区域并动态调用工具，将准确率下降从15-30%p减轻。

articles.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
articles.excerpt: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often fail to generalize to novel setups, such as altered camera viewpoints or robot morphologies, because they are typically conditioned only on current observations and language instructions. articles.summary: 针对VLA模型在新场景（如摄像机视角改变）泛化失败的问题，提出通过上下文世界建模将系统配置作为变量，使模型自适应不同的机器人形态和观测设置。

articles.title: Running the Gauntlet: Re-evaluating the Capabilities of Agents Beyond Familiar Environments
articles.excerpt: As agentic systems continue to evolve and are widely deployed in real-world scenarios, there is a growing demand to faithfully evaluate their capabilities. articles.summary: Gauntlet基准重新评估智能体在熟悉环境以外的能力，覆盖更广泛维度与复杂任务，揭示现有基准因任务简单导致的性能饱和，为真实场景部署提供更可靠评估。

articles.title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
articles.excerpt: While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in solving problems with verifiable solutions, generating physical art that satisfies both strict geometric constraints and subjective visual aesthetics remains a challenge. articles.title: Fast LeWorldModel

articles.summary: Fast LeWorldModel针对基于JEPA的世界模型规划计算昂贵的问题，加速潜空间自回归 rollout，减少预测误差漂移，在高频规划的机器人任务中实现实时推理。

articles.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
articles.excerpt: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to perform complex tasks, and recent agentic reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise for enhancing model capabilities. articles.summary: 研究发现多步工具强化学习容易因动作结构失效而灾难性崩溃，分析发现监督信号（如过程奖励）可稳定训练，避免性能突降并提升工具调用成功率。

articles.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
articles.excerpt: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. articles.summary: Autodata提出通用方法训练智能体充当数据科学家，通过元优化使其学会创建高质量合成训练与评估数据，具体实现Agentic Self-Instruct，在计算机科学任务上验证有效性。

articles.title: OPERA: Aligning Open-Ended Reasoning via Objective Perplexity-based Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has enabled LLMs to excel in objective reasoning tasks such as mathematics and code generation. articles.summary: OPERA针对开放式推理任务中LLM作为评判器的风格偏差与位置不一致问题，提出基于目标困惑度的强化学习方法，为创作类任务提供稳定奖励信号。
